memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u32 CurveType, u64 HashAddr, u32 Size, u64 PrivKeyAddr, u64 EPrivKeyAddr, u64 SignAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticGenerateSign

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to generate elliptic signature for a given hash and curve type.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the hash for which sign has to be generated
Length of the hash in bytes
Address of the static private key
Address of the Ephemeral private key

listitem.para: Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Link shared memory of size EcdsaParams to EcdsaParams structure for IPI usage. Validates the size of the shared memory whether the required size is available or not.
Send request to PLM through generic request API. This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u32 CurveType, u64 PrivKeyAddr, u64 PubKeyAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticGenerateKey

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to generate Public Key for a given curve type.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the static private key
Address of the buffer where public key to be stored.

listitem.para: Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send request to PLM through generic request API. This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to validate the public key for a given curve type.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the public key to be validated

listitem.para: Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send request to PLM through generic request API. This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u32 CurveType, u64 HashAddr, u32 Size, u64 PubKeyAddr, u64 SignAddr)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticVerifySign

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to verify signature for a given hash, key and curve type.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the hash for which sign has to be generated
Length of the hash in bytes

listitem.para: Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Link shared memory of size EcdsaParams to EcdsaParams structure for IPI usage. Validates the size of the shared memory whether the required size is available or not.
Send request to PLM through generic request API. This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the client interface functions for ECDSA driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 kal 03/23/21 Initial release 4.5 kal 03/23/20 Updated file version to sync with library version 4.6 kpt 09/27/21 Fixed compilation warnings 4.7 kpt 11/29/21 Replaced Xil_DCacheFlushRange with XSecure_DCacheFlushRange kpt 01/13/21 Allocated CDO structure's in shared memory set by the user am 03/08/22 Fixed MISRA C violations kpt 03/16/22 Removed IPI related code and added mailbox support 5.0 kpt 07/24/22 Moved XSecure_EllipticKat in to xsecure_katclient.c 5.2 am 03/09/23 Replaced xsecure payload lengths with xmailbox payload lengths yog 05/04/23 Fixed HIS COMF violations 5.4 yog 04/29/24 Fixed doxygen warnings. pre 08/29/24 APIs are updated for SSIT support 5.7 tbk 03/16/26 Added SMC support
